_comment: Locks the Gemini S2S (Gemini Translate) LIVE-TRANSLATE setup-payload wire format, hand-duplicated between Windows (websocket.rs build_live_translate_setup_value) and Android (GeminiS2sProtocol.kt buildGeminiS2sSetupPayload, isGeminiTranslateApiModel branch). Both build this payload for the given input; compared structurally (field order ignored). 'Chinese' is used so targetLanguageCode resolves to the deterministic special-case 'zh-Hans', not the divergent isolang/LanguageCatalog fallback. The LEGACY interpreter payload is NOT locked here — its systemInstruction prose differs by design between platforms (documented deviation in .claude/parity/gemini-s2s-vad.md). Windows is canonical.
